column2: # Aggregate rows within each transect visit: the raw data has one row per coral type,
# so we sum all condition counts to get a single value per transect per health category.
# transect_id = date + site, which uniquely identifies each dive visit.
he   = sum(he,   na.rm = TRUE),  # healthy colonies
dg_m = sum(dg_m, na.rm = TRUE),  # mild degradation
dg_h = sum(dg_h, na.rm = TRUE),  # heavy degradation
pb   = sum(pb,   na.rm = TRUE),  # partial bleaching
fb   = sum(fb,   na.rm = TRUE),  # full bleaching
cat("=== Coral health transects per site ===\n")
return(tibble(category = lbl, statistic = NA, df = NA, p = NA, note = "all zero or <2 sites"))
tibble(category = lbl, statistic = res$statistic, df = res$df, p = res$p, note = "")
cat("\n=== Kruskal–Wallis: coral health indicators ~ site (R2.39) ===\n")
cat("\nPost-hoc Dunn tests for significant categories:\n")
cat("\nNo health categories showed significant site differences at p < 0.05.\n")
